ddls:
CREATE TABLE "high_courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the high court */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the high court is located */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the high court was established */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the high court */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the high court */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the high court */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the high court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the district court */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district court is located */,
  "high_court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding high court */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the district court was established */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the district court */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district court */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the district court */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the district court */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_courts_high_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("high_court_id") REFERENCES high_courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_sewa_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court */,
  "is_implemented" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether e-Sewa kendra is implemented */,
  "functioning_kendras" INTEGER /* Number of functioning e-Sewa kendras */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when e-Sewa kendra was implemented */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_sewa_status_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES high_courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_sewa_kendras" (
  "kendra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each e-Sewa kendra */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court where the kendra is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "operational_date" TEXT /* Date when the kendra became operational */,
  "kendra_name" TEXT /* Name of the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Services offered by the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the e-Sewa kendra */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kendra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_sewa_kendras_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES district_courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court the user is associated with */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the court system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_court_users_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES high_courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_sewa_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_sewa_kendra_services" (
  "kendra_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service offered by the kendra */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kendra_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_sewa_kendra_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "kendra_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the e-Sewa kendra */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_sewa_kendra_logs_kendra_id FOREIGN KEY ("kendra_id") REFERENCES e_sewa_kendras ("kendra_id")
)
